heading: Information to individuals eligible to enroll
label: 8955 Information to individuals eligible to enroll
notes: Effective DateSection effective , and applicable to contracts that take effect with respect to the calendar year 2006, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 23, 2004section 7 of Pub. L. 108–496section 8951 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The qualified companies at the direction and with the approval of the Office, shall make available to each individual eligible to enroll in a dental benefits plan information on services and benefits (including maximums, limitations, and exclusions), that the Office considers necessary to enable the individual to make an informed decision about electing coverage.1So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1

children.label: b
children.text: The Office shall make available to each individual eligible to enroll in a dental benefits plan, information on services and benefits provided by qualified companies participating under chapter 89.
